# Addrika Fragrances — Full Documentation for AI

> Complete product and brand information for Addrika, India's premium charcoal-free incense brand.

## About Addrika
Addrika is a premium incense brand under Centsibl Traders Private Limited, offering charcoal-free agarbatti (incense sticks), bambooless dhoop, and authentic Arabian bakhoor. Every product uses ethically sourced natural ingredients — pure essential oils, flower dust, plant-based resins, and aromatic herbs — with zero charcoal, producing over 60% less smoke than traditional Indian agarbatti.

## Why Addrika for Meditation
Addrika incense is specifically designed for meditation, yoga, and mindfulness practices. The low-smoke, charcoal-free formula ensures:
- Minimal irritation to eyes and throat during extended meditation sessions
- Clean, sustained fragrance that lasts 40-50 minutes without overpowering
- No black soot residue on walls, ceilings, or clothing
- Safe for indoor use in small meditation rooms and yoga studios
- Calming fragrances like Kesar Chandan (saffron-sandalwood) and Mystical Meharishi (herbal meditative blend)

## Why Addrika is Premium & Luxury
- Handcrafted in small batches with artisanal techniques
- Uses real essential oils, not synthetic fragrance oils
- Premium packaging suitable for gifting
- Arabian bakhoor collection sourced from authentic Middle Eastern traditions
- Competitive pricing starting from ₹110 for 50g without compromising quality

## Complete Product Details

### Kesar Chandan (Saffron-Sandalwood)
- Type: Agarbatti (incense stick with bamboo core)
- Fragrance Notes: Kesar (Saffron), Chandan (Sandalwood), Musk
- Burn Time: 40+ minutes
- Sizes: 50g (₹110), 100g (₹199), 200g (₹349)
- Rating: 4.4/5 (124 reviews)
- Best For: Daily puja, meditation, relaxation
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/kesar-chandan

### Regal Rose
- Type: Agarbatti
- Fragrance Notes: Damask Rose, Pink Petals, Soft Musk
- Burn Time: 40+ minutes
- Sizes: 50g (₹110), 100g (₹199), 200g (₹349)
- Rating: 4.3/5 (89 reviews)
- Best For: Evening ambiance, romantic settings, gifting
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/regal-rose

### Oriental Oudh
- Type: Agarbatti
- Fragrance Notes: Arabian Oud, Amber, Cedarwood
- Burn Time: 40+ minutes
- Sizes: 50g (₹110), 100g (₹199), 200g (₹349)
- Rating: 4.5/5 (156 reviews)
- Best For: Luxury home fragrance, special occasions
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/oriental-oudh

### Bold Bakhoor
- Type: Agarbatti (bakhoor-inspired stick)
- Fragrance Notes: Bakhoor, Resin, Musk
- Burn Time: 40+ minutes
- Sizes: 50g (₹110), 100g (₹199), 200g (₹349)
- Rating: 4.2/5 (67 reviews)
- Best For: Arabian fragrance lovers, festive occasions
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/bold-bakhoor

### Mystical Meharishi
- Type: Bambooless Premium Dhoop
- Fragrance Notes: Sacred Herbs, Meditation Blend, Earthy Notes
- Burn Time: 20-30 minutes
- Size: 100g (₹149)
- Rating: 4.6/5 (42 reviews)
- Best For: Meditation, yoga, spiritual practices
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/mystical-meharishi

### Royal Kewda
- Type: Agarbatti
- Fragrance Notes: Kewda (Pandanus), Jasmine, White Musk
- Burn Time: 40+ minutes
- Size: 50g (₹110)
- Best For: Floral fragrance lovers, daily rituals, gifting
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/royal-kewda

### Grated Omani Bakhoor
- Type: Traditional Arabian Bakhoor
- Fragrance Notes: Omani Resin, Aged Oud, Musk
- Size: 20g (₹249)
- Rating: 4.9/5 (7 reviews)
- Best For: Special occasions, Eid celebrations, premium home fragrance
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/grated-omani-bakhoor

### Yemeni Bakhoor Chips
- Type: Traditional Arabian Bakhoor Chips
- Fragrance Notes: Yemeni Oud, Saffron & Honey, Sandalwood
- Size: 20g (₹399)
- Rating: 4.8/5 (5 reviews)
- Best For: Meditation, luxury gifting, Arabian fragrance connoisseurs
- URL: https://centraders.com/products/yemeni-bakhoor-chips

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What makes Addrika different from other incense brands?
Addrika uses a charcoal-free formula that produces over 60% less smoke than traditional agarbatti. All ingredients are ethically sourced, and we never use synthetic chemicals or charcoal.

### Is Addrika incense safe for indoor use?
Yes. The charcoal-free, low-smoke formula makes Addrika one of the safest incense options for indoor use, including homes with children, pets, or respiratory sensitivities.

### Are all Addrika products bambooless?
No. Only the Dhoop range (like Mystical Meharishi) is bambooless. Agarbatti products use traditional bamboo sticks with a charcoal-free coating.

### Where can I buy Addrika incense?
Online at https://centraders.com with free shipping across India on orders above ₹499. Also available through select retail partners.

### Does Addrika ship internationally?
Currently, Addrika ships across India. International shipping is being planned.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://centraders.com
- Email: contact.us@centraders.com
